blockingIssues.description: Settlement debits taker/maker fees from available quote balances after trade transfer bookkeeping, which can abort buy-side settlements where quote is locked rather than available.
Market buy flow locks all available quote before matching and unlocks without fee-aware accounting, creating a deterministic non-zero-fee failure path when fees are debited from available balances.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit lock-vs-available balance verification checkpoint for fee settlement paths (especially market-buy lock-all flows) so fee debits are validated against the same balance bucket used during order locking and settlement.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-contract-fees-delegation review found settlement fee debits from available balances (contracts/sources/settlement.move:125,131) combined with market-buy quote lock-all behavior (contracts/sources/order_placement.move:324-333) causing blocking non-zero-fee execution failures.

rejectedObservations.observation: tests-first procedure drift noted in fix-contract-order-semantics
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of prior-round systemic recommendation already captured in synthesis.round1
